category_sources: source_facts.description says krb5 is a network authentication protocol.
source_facts.homepage is the MIT Kerberos site, which identifies Kerberos as the network authentication protocol.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled MIT Kerberos Documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the MIT Kerberos project site.
docs_sources: Official MIT Kerberos documentation is hosted at web.mit.edu/kerberos/krb5-latest/doc/.
The official krb5 repository README points users to the same web.mit.edu documentation URL.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository describes itself as a mirror of the MIT krb5 repository; official K5Wiki/source guidance identifies MIT krb5 as maintained in Git.
tags_sources: Official MIT Kerberos site and documentation cover Kerberos V5 authentication, administration, application development, and protocol formats.
